name: Mexican Salad, Ole!
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground Beef, Cooked and Drained
1 Can Kidney Beans, Canned, Drained (15 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss together all ingredients except the ground beef.
2. Add the cooled ground beef after mixing the other ingredients.
3. This recipe makes a very large amount and is suitable as a one-dish meal.
4. Serve with tortillas or chips.
5. Typically, Green Goddess or Thousand Island dressing is used.
